title: Fit test - Onboarding flow - Skip Fit Test
scenario: Fit test onboarding screen is skipped but next onboarding screen does not appear after tapping Skip on Device Settings > Onboarding flow
steps: 1. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that supports fit test to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
3. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Proceed through the onboarding flow until reaching the Pairing 2 screen.
6. Continue to the Fit test screen.
7. Tap the Skip button on the Fit test screen.
expected: The next onboarding screen after the Fit test screen is displayed.
